title: Command Popup
description:
This mod adds a pop-up where you can add buttons to execute commands,
this pop-up can be dragged outside the game window, ideal for streaming!
body:
# Command Popup

REQUIRES: https://modrinth.com/mod/imgui-mc/version/1.21.1-1.0.7
As well as modmenu / cloth config

This mod adds a pop-up where you can add buttons to execute commands,
this pop-up can be dragged outside the game window, ideal for streaming!

## How to use

Open the mod menu. Here you can add commands (make sure to expand everything).

If you want a command button for each player you can use `{{player}}` and `{{scoreboard_player}}`.

For example:
- `/tp @s {{player}}`
- `/spectate {{scoreboard_player}}`

etc.
